description_long: This camper is a boxy, elongated vehicle with a deep blue exterior and a flat roof featuring three rectangular skylights. The sides are punctuated by large, rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. A single, brown entry door is located on the right side, positioned between the front and rear wheels. The front of the camper has two large, square windows for the driver and passenger, while the rear features a single, smaller window. The vehicle sits on four black wheels with silver rims, and the lower edge of the body is trimmed in black. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function and visibility.
description: A deep blue, boxy camper with large rectangular windows, a brown side door, and a flat roof with skylights. It has four wheels and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a single rectangular window centered on the back and the black lower trim.
description_view_1: The right side view displays three rectangular windows, a brown entry door, and two visible wheels.
description_view_2: The front view features two large square windows and a wide black bumper.
description_view_3: The left side view shows three rectangular windows and two wheels, with no visible door.
attribute_window_configuration: three rectangular windows on each side, two large square front windows, one small rear window
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front
